raw_title: Book Review: ‘I Want You to Be Happy,’ by Jem Calder
book_title: ‘I Want You to Be Happy,’ by Jem Calder
description: Jem Calder’s novel, “I Want You to Be Happy,” follows the flailing situationship between two aspiring writers with a 12-year age gap.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Journey to Nowhere,’ by Shiva Naipaul
description: In “Journey to Nowhere,” Shiva Naipaul reports on the aftermath of a cult’s disastrous turn away from idealism.
